title: Expose Service via HTTPRoute
description:
## Expose Service via HTTPRoute

In Gateway API, an `HTTPRoute` defines routing rules for HTTP traffic. It references a `Gateway` (its parent) and routes requests based on parameters like hostnames, paths, and headers to backend `Services`.

**Your task:**

Create an `HTTPRoute` named `frontend-route` in the `gateway-lab` namespace that satisfies the following conditions:
- Attaches to the parent Gateway `external-gateway` in the `gateway-lab` namespace.
- Matches incoming traffic for the hostname `example.com`.
- Routes all traffic (path prefix `/`) to the backend service `frontend-service` on port `80`.

```bash
# Verify your progress:
kubectl get httproute frontend-route -n gateway-lab -o yaml
```

hints.title: HTTPRoute structure
hints.body: An HTTPRoute uses spec.parentRefs to declare which Gateway it attaches to, spec.hostnames to specify domains, and spec.rules to define matches and backendRefs.
hints.command:
kubectl apply -f - <<'EOF'
apiVersion: gateway.networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: frontend-route
  namespace: gateway-lab
spec:
  parentRefs:
  - name: external-gateway
  hostnames:
  - "example.com"
  rules:
  - matches:
    - path:
        type: PathPrefix
        value: /
    backendRefs:
    - name: frontend-service
      port: 80
EOF

setup_commands.command:
kubectl apply -f - <<'EOF'
apiVersion: gateway.networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: GatewayClass
metadata:
  name: shared-gateway-class
spec:
  controllerName: example.com/gateway-controller
EOF

kubectl apply -f - <<'EOF'
apiVersion: gateway.networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Gateway
metadata:
  name: external-gateway
  namespace: gateway-lab
spec:
  gatewayClassName: shared-gateway-class
  listeners:
  - name: http-listener
    port: 80
    protocol: HTTP
    allowedRoutes:
      namespaces:
        from: Same
EOF
kubectl create deployment frontend-service --image=nginx:alpine -n gateway-lab 2>/dev/null || true
kubectl expose deployment frontend-service --port=80 -n gateway-lab 2>/dev/null || true

validation.description: Check that the HTTPRoute frontend-route exists and routes traffic correctly

commands.command: kubectl get httproute frontend-route -n gateway-lab -o jsonpath='{.metadata.name}'
kubectl get httproute frontend-route -n gateway-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.parentRefs[0].name}'
kubectl get httproute frontend-route -n gateway-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.hostnames[0]}'
